title: World Diving Calendar - Period Rankings
description: Destinations ranked for each of the 24 bi-monthly periods. Higher score = better diving conditions plus more headline marine life that period.

scoring.marine_excitement_bonus: sum of matched headline-species weights, capped at 25

ranked.name: Maldives
ranked.highlight: Hammerheads Rasdhoo (dawn); Fuvahmulah tiger sharks; grey reef sharks

ranked.name: Raja Ampat
ranked.highlight: Manta peak (Manta Sandy/Ridge); wobbegongs, walking sharks, pygmy seahorses

ranked.name: Truk (Chuuk) Lagoon
ranked.highlight: Coral-encrusted wrecks (266+ fish sp); reef sharks, turtles, rays

ranked.name: Cocos Island
ranked.highlight: Tiger sharks; mobula schools; silky sharks; hammerheads (steady)

ranked.name: Palau
ranked.highlight: Moorish idol aggregation (full moon); mantas; grey reef sharks; whale sharks

ranked.name: Galapagos Islands
ranked.highlight: Mantas; hammerhead schools (smaller); sea lions, iguanas

ranked.name: Seychelles
ranked.highlight: Hawksbill turtle nesting peak; eagle rays; whale sharks may linger

ranked.name: Komodo National Park
ranked.highlight: South mantas PEAK (Manta Alley); hammerheads (south); macro explosion

ranked.name: Red Sea (Egypt)
ranked.highlight: Oceanic whitetip (south), threshers possible; reef & wreck focus

ranked.name: Heron Island
ranked.region: Coral Sea / Southern Great Barrier Reef

ranked.highlight: Barracuda tornado, jackfish, reef sharks, turtles; CNY window
